codeReview.summary: This fix fully addresses the prior blocking issue: SigningFailedModal no longer synthesizes peer-response text and now renders only runtime-sourced failure fields (Round from request_id, Code, Error, optional Failed peer) with a neutral fallback when no failure payload is present. The original behavior from m1-signing-failed-modal for retry/dismiss wiring and sign-only gating remains intact.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-screen-worker skill requires agent-browser visual/manual verification for changed modals, but this fix session recorded only command-based checks and no interactive verification while still marking followedProcedure=true.

summary: I reviewed the fix transcript skeleton and both diffs (original 0c2e642 and fix 7bfabcc). The previously reported synthesized peer-response bug in SigningFailedModal is removed and replaced with real OperationFailure field rendering plus documented fallback, so the prior failure is resolved.
